mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.del = 0 AND m.is_enable = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del = 0 AND m.is_enable = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT id FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND del = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
